history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A video game loadout menu shows a glowing green futuristic weapon centered on the screen with various stats and category panels around it.

Main Subject:
In the center, a detailed gun with a green energy-like glow and angular, mechanical parts is displayed horizontally, pointing to the right. The weapon has a stylized futuristic body, a handle area and trigger guard, and a dark central section with green highlights and small bright details along the frame.

Setting:
The background is a blurred, dark, purple-and-orange sci‑fi themed scene with soft light streaks and bokeh-like dots, suggesting an in-game interface over a game environment. The lighting is largely artificial, with neon green and purple tones illuminating the weapon display.

Visual Details:
On the left side, a vertical menu lists weapon categories with white text labels on dark panels, including “RIFLES,” “MARKSMAN RIFLE,” “MACHINE GUN,” “SUB-MACHINE GUN,” “SHOTGUNS,” “SNIPERS,” and “PISTOLS.” Below, a highlighted selection box shows “M1887,” with smaller cards and counts shown near other weapon entries. The selected item card has a yellow border and shows a graphic of the weapon.
Center-left, the title “M1887- HAND OF HOPE” appears in yellow and white text, with a set of small icon indicators beneath it. Below the weapon, several stat lines appear with colored labels: “Damage,” “Rate of Fire,” “Range,” “Akurasi,” “Kecepatan Gerak,” “Magazine,” “Reload Speed,” and “Armor Penetration.” Some labels are highlighted in green and red, while the stat bars appear as horizontal lines.
On the top bar, multiple small icons and numbers are visible, including “342092” and “7+.” On the right side, there is an “ARMORY” label near the top. A small text line near the right reads “Tunjukkan di Lo…” (the rest is unclear). There is also a status button reading “DIPAKAI” next to it. At the bottom, a horizontal carousel area shows multiple tiles, including one labeled “Gunsmith” with a lock icon and a highlighted tile with the green weapon image, plus another tile with a different weapon silhouette; an orange button to the right reads “DAPATKAN >>”.

Visible Text:
M1887- HAND OF HOPE
Berisi pengumuman kill spesial
RIFLES
MARKSMAN RIFLE
MACHINE GUN
SUB-MACHINE GUN
SHOTGUNS
SNIPERS
PISTOLS
M1887
Damage
Rate of Fire
Range
Akurasi
Kecepatan Gerak
Magazine
Reload Speed
Armor Penetration
ARMORY
Tunjukkan di Lo…
DIPAKAI
Gunsmith
DAPATKAN >>
No important visible text detected on the weapon itself is clear enough to transcribe.

Practical Summary:
The image shows a game weapon selection screen featuring a neon green futuristic gun in the center. It includes category menus, a highlighted “M1887- HAND OF HOPE” item, visible weapon stat bars, and buttons for equipping and obtaining items.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
